---
title: "LeetCode 1475. Final Prices With a Special Discount in a Shop"
subtitle: "商品折扣後的最終價格"
lang: zh-TW
date: 2026-07-18
author: Anthony
categories: [LeetCode, Array, Stack, Monotonic Stack]
description: "[題目連結](https://leetcode.com/problems/final-prices-with-a-special-discount-in-a-shop/description/)"
image: ../../cover/Leetcode.svg
alternate-lang: "/dsa/posts/leetcode/1475-final-prices/1475-final-prices-en.html"
---

給定一個整數陣列 `prices`，其中 `prices[i]` 代表商店中第 `i` 件商品的價格。商店中有一項特殊折扣：如果你購買第 `i` 件商品，你會獲得相當於 `prices[j]` 的折扣，其中 `j` 是滿足 `j > i` 且 `prices[j] <= prices[i]` 的最小索引。否則，你將不會獲得任何折扣。

請回傳一個整數陣列 `answer`，其中 `answer[i]` 是考慮特殊折扣後，你購買第 `i` 件商品所需支付的最終價格。

舉例來說，給定

```
prices = [8, 4, 6, 2, 3]
```

對每個索引套用同樣的規則：

| 索引 | 當前價格 | 折扣依據 | 最終價格 |
| :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| 0 | 8 | 4 | 8 − 4 = 4 |
| 1 | 4 | 2 | 4 − 2 = 2 |
| 2 | 6 | 2 | 6 − 2 = 4 |
| 3 | 2 | 無 | 2 |
| 4 | 3 | 無 | 3 |

可以得到最終陣列 `answer = [4, 2, 4, 2, 3]`。

## 想法

這題的想法是用兩個結構：`answer` 存放每個商品目前的（暫定）最終價格，`stack` 存放還沒找到折扣的商品索引。

逐一走訪 `prices`：

1. 檢查堆疊：只要 `stack` 不為空，且堆頂索引對應的價格大於等於目前價格，就代表目前價格是堆頂商品的折扣依據。把堆頂索引彈出，並將該索引的 `answer` 更新為原價格減去目前價格，重複檢查直到不滿足條件為止。
2. 把目前索引推入 `stack`，目前價格存入 `answer`，作為這個商品暫定的最終價格。

## 實作

::: {.panel-tabset}
## C

```c
int *finalPrices(int *prices, int pricesSize, int *returnSize)
{
    int *stack = (int *)malloc(500 * sizeof(int)); // store index
    int *answer = (int *)malloc(500 * sizeof(int));

    int stackCount = 0;
    int answerCount = 0;

    *returnSize = pricesSize;

    for (int i = 0; i < pricesSize; i++)
    {
        // Resolve the discount for every pending index whose price is not lower than the current one
        while (stackCount != 0 && prices[stack[stackCount - 1]] >= prices[i])
        {
            int j = stack[--stackCount];
            answer[j] = prices[j] - prices[i];
        }

        // No discount resolved yet — assume full price for now
        stack[stackCount++] = i;
        answer[answerCount++] = prices[i];
    }

    free(stack);

    return answer;
}
```

## C++

```cpp
class Solution
{
public:
    vector<int> finalPrices(vector<int> &prices)
    {
        vector<int> stack; // store index
        vector<int> answer;

        for (size_t i = 0; i < prices.size(); i++)
        {
            // Resolve the discount for every pending index whose price is not lower than the current one
            while (!stack.empty() && prices[stack.back()] >= prices[i])
            {
                int j = stack.back();
                stack.pop_back();
                answer[j] = prices[j] - prices[i];
            }

            // No discount resolved yet — assume full price for now
            stack.push_back(i);
            answer.push_back(prices[i]);
        }

        return answer;
    }
};
```

## Python

```python
class Solution:
    def finalPrices(self, prices: list[int]) -> list[int]:
        stack = []  # store index
        answer = []

        for i in range(len(prices)):
            # Resolve the discount for every pending index whose price is not lower than the current one
            while stack and prices[stack[-1]] >= prices[i]:
                j = stack.pop()
                answer[j] = prices[j] - prices[i]

            # No discount resolved yet — assume full price for now
            stack.append(i)
            answer.append(prices[i])

        return answer
```
:::
